metadata.description: Curated subset of the Adirondack 46ers (peaks above 4000 ft) that fall within the High Peaks marketing AOI bbox -74.05,44.08,-73.85,44.32. Hand-authored from the canonical ADK 46ers list with coordinates from the USGS GNIS database. is_official_46er=true means traditional 46-peak set (per Bob Marshall's 1925 list, including peaks later resurveyed below 4000 ft).
metadata.source: Coordinates from USGS GNIS / APA Summits FeatureServer cross-referenced with the canonical 46er list at https://adk46r.org/the-46ers/

properties.name: Mt. Marcy
properties.notes: Highest peak in NY State. Summit benchmark since 1837.

properties.name: Algonquin Peak
properties.notes: Second highest in NY; MacIntyre Range high point.

properties.name: Iroquois Peak
properties.notes: Trailless. South of Algonquin via the MacIntyre Range.

properties.name: Wright Peak
properties.notes: Easiest of the MacIntyres; on the standard Heart Lake trail.

properties.name: Mt. Colden
properties.notes: Between Avalanche Lake and the Opalescent. Trap Dike route.

properties.name: Skylight
properties.notes: South of Marcy; classic stone-pile summit cairn.

properties.name: Mt. Redfield
properties.notes: Trailless. Approach via Uphill Brook from Flowed Lands.

properties.name: Cliff Mountain
properties.notes: Trailless. Lowest 46er after resurvey (technically below 4000 ft but on the original Marshall list).

properties.name: Gray Peak
properties.notes: Trailless. North of Skylight; herd path from Lake Tear of the Clouds.

properties.name: Mt. Marshall
properties.notes: Trailless. SW of Iroquois on the MacIntyre Range.

properties.name: Phelps Mountain
properties.notes: Trailed. North side of Phelps Brook from the Van Hoevenberg Trail.

properties.name: Tabletop Mountain
properties.notes: Trailed. South of Indian Falls; gentle climb.
